case_title: 676 GEARY STREET LLC VS. JILLIAN KRISINGER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE: COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF 676 GEARY STREET LLC
